# terrible_community_general_udm_group (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of the POSIX group.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Group description.
- `ou` (String) LDAP OU, for example `school` for LDAP OU `ou=school,dc=example,dc=com`.
- `position` (String) Define the whole LDAP position of the group, for example `cn=g123m-1A,cn=classes,cn=schueler,cn=groups,ou=schule,dc=example,dc=com`.
- `state` (String) Whether the group is present or not.
- `subpath` (String) Subpath inside the OU, for example `cn=classes,cn=students,cn=groups`.
